1101011011101110 0100010000101011 0 -> sum: 0001101100011001, cout: 1
1010000111100010 0101100101011011 0 -> sum: 1111101100111101, cout: 0
0100010110101000 0101110011000000 0 -> sum: 1010001001101000, cout: 0
1111110111001010 0111110111110000 0 -> sum: 0111101110111010, cout: 1
1000011111110011 1101100101111110 0 -> sum: 0110000101110001, cout: 1
1111100110100100 1000110001110010 0 -> sum: 1000011000010110, cout: 1
0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0
1111111111111111 1111111111111111 1 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 1
0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
1111111111111110 1111111111111111 1 -> sum: 1111111111111110, cout: 1
0111111111111111 1000000000000000 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
